title: Black Salt Moon (Witch House genre - shot 1)
caption: Witch House genre - untouched pure AI
about: One of the first pure genre test songs we did on Suno that came out great!
lyrics:
[Verse 1]
I leave black salt
On your front step
Cold little trace
For what you swept

Your name in smoke
On the glass pane
I read it slow
Then it goes blank

[Pre-Chorus]
Follow the mark
Follow the mark
Under the floor
Under the dark

[Chorus]
Come down
Come down
Stay with me now
Come down
Come down
Under the cloud

(black salt moon)
(black salt moon)

[Verse 2]
Old screen glow
On a pale wall
Three thin knocks
Then the whole room falls

Your hands in the ash
Your eyes half-shut
You move like a curse
I can't wake up

[Pre-Chorus]
Follow the mark
Follow the mark
Under the floor
Under the dark

[Chorus]
Come down
Come down
Stay with me now
Come down
Come down
Under the cloud

(black salt moon)
(black salt moon)

[Bridge]
Turn the key slow
Let the night in
Say my small name
Let it begin

[Final Chorus]
Come down
Come down
Stay with me now
Come down
Come down
Under the cloud

(black salt moon)
(black salt moon)
